items.summary: Replace the current studio description content on the Info page with the user-provided expanded Hebrew content, while keeping the existing page layout and styling conventions (same container/section structure and Tailwind class patterns) consistent with the rest of the site.

Ensure the updated Info page renders Hebrew correctly with right-to-left (RTL) support, including correct text alignment, directionality, and bold styling consistent with the codebase’s existing HTML/JSX conventions.
